_comment: Thresholds for qc-audio.py post-render audio QC. dBFS/LUFS in decibels. Edit here, not in code.
_hot_note: hot_window is RELATIVE: flags a ~1s window whose RMS is hot_margin_db over the program median (the 'one loud insert' case), robust to overall loudness. abs_peak_dbfs is a separate true digital-clip guard near 0 dBFS (real clipping; loudnorm true-peak is checked in loudness).
_tail_note: RMS-cliff (program->silence cut-out) is the RELIABLE truncation canary. The click sub-check (max step > tail_click_thresh AND > tail_click_ratio x median step) catches GROSS/uncompressed clicks but AAC smears transients below ~0.3, so it can miss codec-smeared clicks on a lossy master — QC the pre-encode WAV/master if click precision matters.
lufs_band_note: lufs_band can be widened to ~1.5 if -14.0 +/-1.0 is too tight for a hand-mixed master
